t: Adding Sticker packs and iMessage apps to the system Stickers app, Messages camera, and FaceTime
a: Enable your Sticker pack or iMessage app in the media context.

t: Adding your sticker packs to Messages
a: Drag and drop your sticker pack into the Stickers asset catalog to let people access your stickers from Messages.

t: Creating a Sticker App with a Custom Layout
a: Expand on the Messages sticker app template to create an app with a customized user interface.
Allow users to collaborate on the design of ice cream sundae stickers.

t: Preparing your app to be the default messaging app
a: Configure your messaging app so people can set it as the default on their device.

t: Sending SMS messages from an app
a: Send critical messages from inside your app using the Critical Messaging API.
